llm_analysis:
Prompt: You are an IDS specification expert. Classify structured components into the 6 IDS Facet types.

IDS Facet type definitions:
- Entity: Concrete building elements (IfcWall, IfcDoor, IfcWindow, etc.)
- Property: Quantifiable properties from PropertySets (thickness, strength, thermal transmittance)
- Attribute: Descriptive properties (name, identifier, code)
- Material: Material types and specifications (reinforced concrete, brick, steel)
- Classification: Classification requirements and codes (Uniclass, OmniClass, ETIM, compliance statements)
- PartOf: Spatial containment relationships (located in, contained in, part of)

Input components: [{"text": "IfcProject entity", "type": "building_object", "details": {"object_type": "IfcProject", "modifiers": ["exactly one"]}, "confidence": 0.95}, {"text": "provides default units for length (meters)", "type": "property_description", "details": {"property_name": "length_unit", "constraint_text": "meters"}, "confidence": 0.9}, {"text": "provides default units for angle (degrees)", "type": "property_description", "details": {"property_name": "angle_unit", "constraint_text": "degrees"}, "confidence": 0.9}, {"text": "provides default units for mass (kilograms)", "type": "property_description", "details": {"property_name": "mass_unit", "constraint_text": "kilograms"}, "confidence": 0.9}, {"text": "provides default units for temperature (Celsius)", "type": "property_description", "details": {"property_name": "temperature_unit", "constraint_text": "Celsius"}, "confidence": 0.9}]

Classification rules:
1. Properties with numerical constraints → Property
2. Concrete building elements → Entity
3. Material names and requirements → Material
4. Location and spatial relationships → PartOf
5. Classification codes, standards, and compliance requirements → Classification
6. Descriptive information → Attribute

**Enhanced Classification Detection:**
- Text mentioning classification systems (Uniclass, OmniClass, ETIM, etc.) → Classification
- Compliance statements ("must comply with", "according to", "classified as") → Classification
- Standard codes and references → Classification

**Enhanced PartOf Detection:**
- Spatial relationships ("located in", "contained in", "part of", "within") → PartOf
- Room/space references ("in mechanical rooms", "within building") → PartOf

Output JSON format:
{
    "entity_candidates": [
        {
            "source_text": "source text",
            "facet_type": "entity",
            "confidence": 0.9,
            "reasoning": "classification reason"
        }
    ],
    "property_candidates": [...],
    "attribute_candidates": [...],
    "material_candidates": [...],
    "classification_candidates": [...],
    "partof_candidates": [...]
}

Output JSON only, no other text....
Response: {'content': '```json\n{\n    "entity_candidates": [\n        {\n            "source_text": "IfcProject entity",\n            "facet_type": "Entity",\n            "confidence": 0.95,\n            "reasoning": "Concrete IFC building object type representing the root project entity"\n        }\n    ],\n    "property_candidates": [\n        {\n            "source_text": "provides default units for length (meters)",\n            "facet_type": "Property",\n            "confidence": 0.9,\n            "reasoning": "Quantifiable property with numerical constraint specifying unit measurement"\n        },\n        {\n            "source_text": "provides default units for angle (degrees)",\n            "facet_type": "Property",\n            "confidence": 0.9,\n            "reasoning": "Quantifiable property with numerical constraint specifying unit measurement"\n        },\n        {\n            "source_text": "provides default units for mass (kilograms)",\n            "facet_type": "Property",\n            "confidence": 0.9,\n            "reasoning": "Quantifiable property with numerical constraint specifying unit measurement"\n        },\n        {\n            "source_text": "provides default units for temperature (Celsius)",\n            "facet_type": "Property",\n            "confidence": 0.9,\n            "reasoning": "Quantifiable property with numerical constraint specifying unit measurement"\n        }\n    ],\n    "attribute_candidates": [],\n    "material_candidates": [],\n    "classification_candidates": [],\n    "partof_candidates": []\n}\n```'}...
